etymology.description: 冂(冂) (jiōng, "borders") enclosing 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") = enclosed space or closed area
etymology.interpretation: The character 冋 consists of 冂(冂) (jiōng, "borders"), representing an enclosing or surrounding shape, with 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") inside, symbolizing something that is closed off or confined within those borders.
